EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice Seven
EmailTemplate.subject: 温馨提示：22日研发参观及班车时间 Reminder: R&D Center visit on the 22nd and shuffle bus schedule
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
温馨提示：研发参观时间22日9:00-11:30，大巴车于酒店正门9点发车，请提前上车。 无参观安排的领导，大巴车于22日8:10酒店正门发车，前往国际中心（返程18:10，23日同）。
Reminder: R&D Center visit on the 22nd from 9:00 to 11:30. Bus departs at 9:00 from the hotel main entrance. Please be early.
For those not visiting, bus to International Center departs at 8:10, 22nd from the hotel main entrance (returning at 18:10, same schedule on the 23rd).
